subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth and made them clear signs unto all the worlds. Say: Verily, the fragrance of the garment hath been diffused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق و جعلها بینات للعالمین قل قد فاحت نفحه القمیص فی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @call to action, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution
